name: Peninsula Energy Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 61% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.4200, stop A$0.3366, target A$0.6200 (2.40:1) — then trail it.
